meta.title: Siba Osman — Nutrition Specialist
meta.description: Personalized nutrition plans to help you achieve your health goals with dietitian Siba Osman.

hero.title: Your Journey to Better Health Starts Here
hero.subtitle: As a dedicated nutrition specialist, I create personalized plans that fit your lifestyle, helping you reach your health goals with confidence and support every step of the way.

steps.title: Personalized Plans
steps.description: Custom nutrition plans tailored to your body, lifestyle, and goals.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.description: Regular follow-ups and adjustments to keep you on track.

steps.title: Expert Guidance
steps.description: Evidence-based advice from a certified nutrition specialist.

steps.title: Lasting Results
steps.description: Build sustainable habits for long-term health and wellness.
